tasks.label: 1: Build libopenmpt
tasks.command: make -j$(nproc) TEST=0 EXAMPLES=0 OPENMPT123=0 IN_OPENMPT=0 XMP_OPENMPT=0 FUZZ=0
tasks.detail: Builds the libopenmpt static library, a dependency for audiodecoder.openmpt.

tasks.label: 2: Configure & Build audiodecoder.openmpt
tasks.detail: Configures, builds the audiodecoder.openmpt project and copies addon resources.

tasks.label: 3: Deploy to CoreELEC
tasks.command: ssh root@192.168.1.240 'rm -rf /storage/.kodi/addons/audiodecoder.openmpt' && rsync -av --delete --no-perms --no-owner --no-group -e ssh ${workspaceFolder}/audiodecoder.openmpt/build/audiodecoder.openmpt/ root@192.168.1.240:/storage/.kodi/addons/audiodecoder.openmpt/ && ssh root@192.168.1.240 'systemctl restart kodi'
tasks.detail: Deploys the built addon to CoreELEC via SSH and restarts Kodi.

tasks.label: 4: CMake: Clean audiodecoder.openmpt
tasks.detail: Cleans the build directory of the audiodecoder.openmpt project.

tasks.label: Set up armhf QEMU VM chroot
args: CHROOT_DIR="/srv/armhf_chroot"; PROJECT_DIR="/home/builder/kodi_project"; sudo mountpoint -q $CHROOT_DIR/proc || sudo mount -t proc proc $CHROOT_DIR/proc; sudo mountpoint -q $CHROOT_DIR/sys || sudo mount --rbind /sys $CHROOT_DIR/sys; sudo mountpoint -q $CHROOT_DIR/dev || sudo mount --rbind /dev $CHROOT_DIR/dev; sudo mountpoint -q $CHROOT_DIR$PROJECT_DIR || sudo mount --bind $PROJECT_DIR $CHROOT_DIR$PROJECT_DIR; echo 'ARMv7-A environment is mounted and ready.'
tasks.detail: Mounts system files and project directory for armhf QEMU chroot. Run once per x64 VM boot.

tasks.label: Chroot into armhf environment
tasks.detail: Chroot into the armhf environment to run commands as if on an armhf system.

tasks.label: Cleanup armhf QEMU VM chroot
args: CHROOT_DIR="/srv/armhf_chroot"; PROJECT_DIR="/home/builder/kodi_project"; sudo umount $CHROOT_DIR$PROJECT_DIR; sudo umount $CHROOT_DIR/proc; sudo umount $CHROOT_DIR/sys; sudo umount $CHROOT_DIR/dev; echo 'Chroot cleanup complete.'
tasks.detail: Unmounts project folder and system files from the chroot. Run when all work is done.
